assistant.title: Mai Taimako
assistant.welcome: Yi amfani da akwatin rubutu a ƙasa ko waɗannan maɓallan aiki don fara.
assistant.welcomeAlt: Sannu! Tambaye ni komai, ko yana da alaƙa da DeHub ko a'a, zan iya taimaka maka.
assistant.errorGeneric: Yi haƙuri, kuskure ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
assistant.noResponse: Yi haƙuri, ban iya samar da amsa ba.
assistant.alwaysSpeakRepliesDesc: Faɗi duk amsoshi, ba murya kaɗai ba
assistant.imageCopyFailed: Ba a iya kwafin hoto ba
assistant.requiredBeforeApproving: Ana buƙata kafin a amince da canja wuri
assistant.pinSetSuccess: An saita PIN na canja wuri cikin nasara
assistant.pinTooShort: PIN dole ne ya kasance aƙalla lambobi 4
assistant.pinRemoved: An cire PIN na canja wuri
assistant.autoModeEnabled: An kunna yanayin atomatik - canja wuri za su amince da kansu
assistant.safetyBlocked: Ba za a iya ƙirƙirar wannan abun ciki a DeHub ba - muna dandali na iyali! Gwada wani abu 🎨
assistant.whatsHappeningNews: Me ke faruwa a cikin labarai yau?
assistant.loginRequired: Shiga don samun damar Mai Taimako da buɗe manyan fasaloli kamar ƙirƙirar hoto da bidiyo.

aiChat.title: Mai Taimako
aiChat.welcomePost:
Zan iya ganin wannan {{type}}. {{context}}

Me kake son sani game da shi?
aiChat.welcomeGeneral: Sannu! Ni ne mai taimakarka. Tambaye ni komai - ina nan don taimaka maka da tambayoyi, ra'ayoyi, ko tattaunawa kawai.
aiChat.errorGeneric: Yi haƙuri, kuskure ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
aiChat.noResponse: Yi haƙuri, ban iya samar da amsa ba.
aiChat.askAnything: Tambaye ni komai ko ƙirƙiri hoto...
aiChat.describeEdits: Bayyana yadda za a gyara wannan hoto...
